query_normalized: predicting material stability using machine learning and dft calculations chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies acceptance criteria (a) and (b) because it quantifies the uncertainty and reproducibility of DFT-calculated formation energies and other properties, which are the fundamental physical observables and inputs required for predicting material stability. By establishing the variance and error margins inherent in the DFT data used for such predictions, it provides the essential empirical baseline and domain-specific context for any machine learning study relying on these calculat
